trust_assessment.tier_b_trust: moderate — single FBref season; passing/dribbling often zeroed
trust_assessment.tier_c_trust: intentional — manual/legend season picks; accurate to chosen season not current form
trust_assessment.tier_d_trust: low — sparse minutes or incomplete FBref fields

executive_summary.verdict: Stats are ACCURATE to their underlying source seasons, but only ~73% reflect current two-season Sofascore form. The rest are intentional or fallback historical/FBref profiles.

John Stones_24_25.note: Injury-short 24/25 season confirmed by live FBref fetch. Per-90 rates are mathematically correct but noisy at this sample size.

Riyad Mahrez_22_23.note: Intentional 22/23 Man City season pick (manual_profiles). Reasonable for sim given he left Europe; not current form.

notable_misrepresentations: 14 retired/semi-retired players use historical_best peak seasons (Higuain 15/16, Marcelo 17/18, etc.) — accurate to chosen peak, not 2025.
11 players have FBref-sourced profiles with zero passes/dribbles/key_passes — sim under-models buildup (Stones, Mahrez, Ramos, Cavani, etc.).
John Stones: correct 24/25 injury minutes but low-sample; goals90 0.33 is real but volatile.
Éder Militão: 496 min in 23/24 after injury — accurate but low-sample.
Endrick: 813 min blended — young player, thin sample on otherwise Tier A profile.
Ayoub El Kaabi: FBref 23/24 Greece (1964 min) — correct for that league/season, not current Saudi move.
Ronaldo/Messi cache = current Saudi/MLS Sofascore blend; prime seasons only apply when team uses prime slot.
5 manual_profiles in cache (Fernandinho, Suárez, Firmino, Neymar, Falcão) override default with curated season picks.

tournament_trust.overall: Moderately trustworthy for a fantasy tournament with historical/legend picks.
tournament_trust.active_top5_squads: High — ~74% of players use recent two-season Sofascore blends.
tournament_trust.legend_retired_picks: Fair if tournament expects peak/historical seasons; misleading if users expect 2025 form.
tournament_trust.fixed_players_stones_mahrez_elkaabi: Stones and Mahrez verified against FBref. El Kaabi FBref Greece 23/24 is plausible; non-top-5 caveat applies.
tournament_trust.sim_bias_risks: FBref profiles missing passing/dribbling; low-minute players have per-90 variance.
